title: ChurnLens Research Datasets
description: Free, downloadable industry datasets from ChurnLens. CC BY 4.0.

items.title: SaaS Churn Rate Benchmarks 2026
items.content_text: Annual churn rate benchmarks across SaaS segments — from SMB to enterprise, by ACV range and customer tier. Data aggregated from publicly available industry surveys and financial disclosures.

items.title: SaaS Net Revenue Retention by Segment 2026
items.content_text: Net revenue retention (NRR) benchmarks broken down by company size, ACV range, and go-to-market model. Essential reference for SaaS finance and investor diligence.
